title: dolichos lualabensis
intro: Dolichos lualabensis, also known as the Lualaba bean or dolichos bean, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dolichos lualabensis are said to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
